extortion.description: [AI generated] PARTNER.RO is a Romanian based company that offers a range of business development support services. The company is known for helping small and medium-sized enterprises with their market entry strategies, business matchmaking, and ongoing management and operational support. They work across a variety of sectors, leveraging a broad network of contacts to help companies successfully establish and grow their operations. In addition to these services, they also provide consultancy in marketing and sales strategies.
